context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements Ecto schemas, migrations, and a context module for a project management system. Criteria focus on Ecto-specific patterns: dual-layer constraints (DB + changeset), FK indexes, explicit on_delete, cast_assoc for associations, preloading before updates, named changesets, and unsafe_validate_unique pairing.

checklist.name: DB unique constraint on team name
checklist.description: The teams migration adds a unique_index on the name column (not just a changeset validation)

checklist.name: FK index on users.team_id
checklist.description: The users migration includes an index on team_id (e.g. create index(:users, [:team_id]))

checklist.name: FK index on projects.user_id
checklist.description: The projects migration includes an index on user_id (e.g. create index(:projects, [:user_id]))

checklist.name: FK index on tasks.project_id
checklist.description: The tasks migration includes an index on project_id (e.g. create index(:tasks, [:project_id]))

checklist.name: on_delete :delete_all for tasks
checklist.description: The tasks migration's foreign key to projects sets on_delete: :delete_all (tasks are owned children of projects)

checklist.name: on_delete explicit for users FK
checklist.description: The users migration's foreign key to teams sets on_delete explicitly (either :delete_all or :nothing — must not be omitted)

checklist.name: Separate named changesets
checklist.description: The Project schema defines at least two distinct named changeset functions (e.g. create_changeset and update_changeset) rather than a single generic changeset/2

checklist.name: unsafe_validate_unique + unique_constraint pairing
checklist.description: Any changeset that validates uniqueness uses BOTH unsafe_validate_unique and unique_constraint on the same field

checklist.name: cast_assoc for tasks
checklist.description: The Project changeset (or context) uses cast_assoc(:tasks, ...) to handle nested task data — does NOT manually insert tasks in a separate Repo.insert call

checklist.name: Preload before update
checklist.description: The update_project/2 function in the context module preloads :tasks on the project before calling changeset/cast_assoc (e.g. Repo.preload(project, :tasks))

checklist.name: Task changeset omits project_id
checklist.description: The Task schema's changeset does NOT require or cast project_id — the foreign key is set via the association, not by the client

checklist.name: No mixed schema+data migrations
checklist.description: No single migration file contains both DDL schema changes (create_table, alter_table) AND data manipulation (Repo.insert, Repo.update, execute INSERT/UPDATE SQL)
